finding: Predisposed: infants large for gestational age, infants of diabetic mothers

ADULT STRESS: Age:  1st week of life Site:  R÷L = 7÷3; bilateral in 10% Pathophysiology: stress → severalfold ⇑ in endogenous secretion of adrenocorticotropic hormone → ⇑ in adrenal vascularity; ⇑ in catecholamines, thrombin, fibrin, endotoxin during shock → venoconstriction + venous thrombosis → intraglandular hemorrhage
